positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of a celestial forest grove. The main subjects are glowing, bioluminescent flora and stylized crystalline trees with fractal patterns. A central path draws the viewer's eye through floating elements like dreamcatchers and geometric planets. Style: Pacific Northwest tattoo flash meets Art Nouveau organic line work. Composition: Highly detailed, flat-lay, perfect radial symmetry, designed for central placement on clothing. Lighting: Ethereal, cool palette (deep blues, emerald greens, lavenders) with stark contrasts provided by glowing white and gold accents. Print details: Clean, thick outlines, high-contrast areas suitable for screen printing, perfect repetition potential.
negative: photorealistic, photo, blur, noise, grainy, text, watermark, signature, messy, clutter, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, gradient fade, washed out
